purpose: Record Aid Another action split and combat feat runtime support for Force Unleashed / Scum and Villainy batch.

actions.name: Aid Another (Skill)
actions.mechanic: Standard Action. Roll same skill or ability check; DC 10 grants ally +2. Cannot Take 10. Exposes aidAnotherContext=skill.

actions.name: Aid Another (Attack)
actions.mechanic: Standard Action. Attack Reflex Defense 10; success grants one ally +2 on one next attack against that opponent. Exposes aidAnotherContext=attack.

actions.name: Aid Another (Suppress)
actions.mechanic: Standard Action. Attack Reflex Defense 10; success gives opponent -2 on its next attack roll. Exposes aidAnotherContext=suppress.

aidAnother.adapter: AidAnotherActionAdapter injects the three cards into CombatActionsMapper, renders guided chat cards, and exposes collectAidAnotherRiders(actor, context) for feat/talent metadata.

implementedEntries.name: Angled Throw
implementedEntries.mechanic: Active grenade/grenade-like attack option. Runtime helper resolves post-roll Cover/Improved Cover ignore when attack total exceeds Reflex 15. Total Cover is not ignored.

implementedEntries.name: Blaster Barrage
implementedEntries.mechanic: Autofire damage rider. When Autofire damages at least one target, helper exposes target-scoped +2 circumstance bonus for allies' Autofire attacks against the same target until beginning of source next turn.

implementedEntries.name: Crossfire
implementedEntries.mechanic: Ranged miss rider. If a missed target had Soft Cover, helper exposes once/round immediate attack against soft-cover provider with same weapon and same attack bonus.

implementedEntries.name: Deadly Sniper
implementedEntries.mechanic: Ranged attack modifier. When target is unaware and context indicates first attack this turn, adds +2 attack and +1 weapon die damage.

implementedEntries.name: Desperate Gambit
implementedEntries.mechanic: Miss reroll resource. On miss, helper exposes once/turn reroll with keep-second-result and Reflex penalty metadata: -2, or -5 if the miss was a natural 1, until end of next turn.

implementedEntries.name: Wicked Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: Rapid Strike hit rider. On damaging single non-Area melee Rapid Strike, helper exposes once/turn immediate secondary attack at -2 against a second target within reach; hit deals half original damage.

automationBoundary.Angled Throw: Attack workflow must pass grenade context, selected option state, and final attack total before cover override can be consumed.
automationBoundary.Blaster Barrage: Autofire workflow must persist target-scoped ally bonus state and expire it at beginning of source next turn.
automationBoundary.Crossfire: Ranged attack workflow must pass soft-cover provider identity and enforce once/round use.
automationBoundary.Desperate Gambit: Attack workflow must present/spend the reroll and apply the Reflex penalty effect after use.
automationBoundary.Wicked Strike: Rapid Strike workflow must present/spend secondary attack and apply half original damage on hit.
